evidence.title: Siasat report on Iran western airspace restrictions and OIIX A1010/26
evidence.source_description: Siasat.com article page captured via web open on 2026-06-30; relevant visible page text extracted.
evidence.relevance: Provides independent corroborating reporting that a NOTAM identified as OIIX A1010/26 announced closure of airports across the western section of the Tehran FIR, limited operations to daylight, and required fresh Iran CAA approval before passenger flights in affected areas.

evidence.title: Notamify capture of OIIX A1015/26 replacing A1010/26
evidence.source_description: Notamify NOTAM page captured via web open on 2026-06-30; relevant page text and raw NOTAM extracted from visible lines.
evidence.relevance: Shows raw NOTAM text for Tehran FIR/OIIX stating A1015/26 NOTAMR A1010/26, applicable May 23 18:21 UTC to May 25 08:30 UTC, closing all airports in the west part of Tehran FIR except listed airports, limiting them to sunrise-sunset operations, suspending previous permissions, and requiring Iran CAA permission for civil IFR passenger flights.

evidence.title: Abdi Media report on A1010/26 western Tehran FIR restrictions
evidence.source_description: Abdi Media English article page captured via web open on 2026-06-30; relevant visible page text extracted.
evidence.relevance: Corroborates A1010/26 details: restrictions and closure of airports in western Iran/Tehran FIR extended until May 25, 2026; all airports in western Tehran FIR closed except specified airports with limited sunrise-sunset operations; prior permissions canceled and new Civil Aviation Organization authorization required for IFR passenger flights.

evidence.title: Notamify capture of OIIX A0796/26 west Tehran FIR overflight closure
evidence.source_description: Notamify NOTAM page found during rebuttal search for A0796/26; relevant page text and raw NOTAM extracted from visible search result/open text.
evidence.relevance: Directly addresses the defense argument that plaintiff lacked evidence about transiting/overflights. A0796/26 states Tehran FIR resumed normal operation while the west part remained closed for overflights, with applicability through May 25 08:30 UTC; A1015/26 expressly references A0796/26.
